title: lysimachia saxicola var. saxicola
intro: Lysimachia saxicola var. saxicola, also known as rock jasmine or mountain barberry, is a type of flowering plant in the primrose family that is native to the mountainous regions of eastern Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lysimachia saxicola var. saxicola include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
